data.title: 9 Consumer Discretionary Stocks Whale Activity In Today's Session
Vanguard Bets On Active Bond Strategy With Launch Of Short Duration ETF
data.description: Vanguard introduces a new bond ETF, Vanguard Short Duration Bond, designed for stable income in an uncertain rate environment. Active approach with low costs and mix of bonds.

data.title: Sequencing Company PacBio Cuts Costs Amid Uncertainty Around NIH Funding And New Tariffs
data.description: PacBio reaffirms 2025 revenue outlook and unveils cost-cutting measures as Vega system demand grows and Revio usage meets expectations.

data.title: Is Legal Weed In Trouble? Taxes, Oversupply And Hemp Threat Drove A $21-Billion Cut In Sales Estimates
data.description: Whitney Economics cuts U.S. cannabis forecast by $21B, citing taxes, oversupply & lack of federal reform.

data.title: Bitcoin Hits $82,000 As President Trump Announces 90-Day Pause On Reciprocal Tariffs For All Countries But China
